Black Friday sale unlocked! Save 70% on MonsterInsights! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3Ng-cWYsh0mMuHCQ-haGczW98UMz_Z0PHHkl7Tg51Zg )

Hey Muhammad,

Black Friday deals are HERE:
💥 Get 70% off MonsterInsights Pro now 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3Ng-cWYsh0mMuHCQ-haGczW98UMz_Z0PHHkl7Tg51Zg )
 💥

Now’s your chance to get our BIGGEST Black Friday deal ever: 70%
off the best Google Analytics plugin for WordPress. It's
absoluetly the best time to upgrade!

Make your New Year’s resolution early this year to get better
insights about your users, drive more growth, and make more money
in 2025!

Plus, we’re sweetening the deal by adding one year of
UserFeedback Plus for free. MonsterInsights shows you what’s
happening on your site; UserFeedback shows you why.

Get Started Now for 70% Off 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3Ng-cWYsh0mMuHCQ-haGczW98UMz_Z0PHHkl7Tg51Zg )
Until next time,
Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator

*Discount applies to new purchases and upgrades only.
